creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #8)
<<Not likely to work without also deleting/disabling
whatever is providing the UEFI-style-boot...>

eimar.koort@tutamail.com  swore to us :-) that he doesn't even know uefiDev.
So we can assume that the crap is in the new firmware files.
By overwriting the whole msdos partition with October 2020 release,
the issue should be fixed for him.
